overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a high-quality game engine showing exploration of a futuristic industrial facility on a desert-like planet. The player moves from indoor corridors to outdoor areas with red dirt ground, passing industrial buildings, vehicles, and large solar arrays while holding a handgun.

events.description: exits covered corridor into bright outdoor industrial yard

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through covered corridor with white walls and green horizontal stripes, approaching exit

white industrial wall with green horizontal stripe running along the middle
large metal shipping container with yellow markings
large white industrial door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a covered industrial corridor with white walls marked by green stripes. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the concrete floor as the player approaches an exit door leading outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with red dirt ground and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through open industrial yard, observing the surroundings and distant solar arrays

large field of blue solar panel arrays extending into the distance
reddish-brown dirt and gravel ground surface
tall electrical utility pole with crossbars
small building with corrugated metal walls

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the scene opens into a bright industrial yard with red dirt ground. A white cargo van sits parked to the left while massive solar arrays are visible in the distant background under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial complex with visible smoke from distant fires

events.description: black smoke from distant fire becomes visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: navigating around industrial buildings, turning right to follow the path between structures

entered.detail: large red industrial pipes running along the ground
black metal barrel near the building wall
thick black smoke rising from damaged structures in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the industrial complex, the player passes red industrial pipes and metal barrels. Black smoke becomes visible rising from damaged structures in the distance, while the solar arrays now appear to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated concrete platform with industrial pipes and steam vents

events.description: steps up onto elevated concrete platform with large pipes
steam vents visible from damaged pipe joints

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated concrete platform, observing the industrial pipes and distant facility

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal pipes with steam escaping from joints
white steam venting from pipe connections
tall structure with GUILD signage visible

segments.scene_description: The player ascends onto an elevated concrete platform featuring massive industrial pipes with steam venting from damaged sections. Cylindrical storage tanks and a distant structure labeled GUILD are visible as the player navigates the platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level corridor between modular industrial buildings

events.description: descends from concrete platform back to dirt ground level

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow passages between white modular buildings, approaching stairs

entered.detail: concrete stairs leading up between buildings
narrow passage between white modular industrial buildings
yellow and black striped safety barrier

segments.scene_description: Descending from the platform, the player navigates narrow dirt corridors between white modular industrial buildings. Concrete stairs lead upward ahead as the player moves through the confined ground-level passages.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile interior of an industrial facility out into a sprawling, damaged desert complex. It begins within a covered corridor of white walls and green stripes, moving under fluorescent lights toward an exit door. As the camera steps outside, the scene opens into a bright industrial yard of red dirt featuring a parked cargo van and massive solar arrays under a partly cloudy sky. The movement continues deeper into the complex past red pipes and metal barrels as black smoke begins to rise from distant ruins, before ascending onto an elevated concrete platform where steam vents from damaged pipes near cylindrical storage tanks and a structure labeled GUILD. Finally, the camera descends from the platform to navigate narrow dirt corridors between white modular buildings, moving toward a set of concrete stairs.
